description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with fabric tape inseam, short sleeves with brand badge on right sleeve hem and a graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWith comfort and style rolled into one, this t-shirt from puma is a great addition to your wardrobe. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the photographic print on the front lends it a busy vibe. Team this with jeans and suede shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
